name: Backgammon
author: Abstract Games factory
description: Backgammon: the classic race-and-block dice game. Roll two dice and move your checkers around the 24-point board into your home quadrant, then bear them off; first to bear off all of them wins. Land on a lone enemy checker (a blot) to send it to the bar, where it must re-enter before its owner can play anything else. Doubles let you move four times; you must use both dice if you legally can. (Single-game version: no doubling cube.) Setup option: standard backgammon (15 checkers), Nackgammon (a more contact-heavy 15-checker start), or Hypergammon (just 3 checkers each, on the 24/23/22-points, for a fast tactical race).
